validation.joint_boundary_and_extcur_gradient: finite and nonzero in both parameter blocks
validation.companion_install_guard: an installed PyPI 0.0.2 without ExteriorFieldConfig now skips instead of failing

unrematerialized.assessment: passes numerically but retains an expensive moving-surface reverse graph

rematerialized_target_chunk_8.reason: target chunking increased compile/runtime cost and peak memory on this CPU case

assessment: The exact simultaneous plasma-boundary plus coil gradient is scientifically valid but not a lightweight production adjoint at this resolution. Rematerialization is the accepted default for the moving-surface example. NESTOR remains the production forward/parity solver; small-parameter solved-LCFS derivatives use forward implicit sensitivity. A many-parameter solved-LCFS NESTOR adjoint is deferred until a compact operator-level transpose can meet a memory gate.
